texto: One can imagine that if humanity suddenly disappeared from the planet, the cat would shrug its shoulders, raise its tail, and return to its forest habitat, there to live as its ancestors have done for two million years, forever in search of something small, furry, and squeaky to play with.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Eric Chaline sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “One can imagine that if humanity suddenly disappeared from the planet, the cat would shrug its sh…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a desenvolvimento-pessoal, cat, cats, útil em momentos de cats.
